message:
🌱 Add n8n: Calling a sub-workflow with a wait by webhook node, don't mission (#1447)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "n8n-13135-calling-a-sub-workflow-with-a-wait-by-webhook-node-don-t-return-the-da",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "n8n: Calling a sub-workflow with a wait by webhook node, don't return the data of the last node, but the node before the wait.",
+    "description": "Calling a sub-workflow with a wait by webhook node, don't return the data of the last node, but the node before the wait.. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current n8n deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your n8n version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nhelm list -n n8n 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working n8n installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review n8n configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n\n```\n## Describe the problem/error/question\nWhen calling a sub-workflow containing a Wait (Webhook) node, the return data is incorrect:\n- When called as Agent Tool: Returns data from node before Wait\n- When called as Workflow: Returns initial input"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Calling a sub-workflow with a wait by webhook node, don't…",
+        "description": "## Summary\n\nExecuting sub workflows with `Execute Sub Workflow`s in `options.waitForSubWorkflow` mode containing `Wait` nodes or \"Human in the Loop\" `sendAndWait` nodes would make them return wrong data to the parent workflow once execution resumed after the sub workflow resumed from `waiting`\n```yaml\n[\n  {\n    \"url\": \"https://x.com/tom_doerr/status/1887628241587827097\"\n  }\n]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Calling a sub-workflow with a wait by webhook node, don't…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Summary\n\nExecuting sub workflows with `Execute Sub Workflow`s in `options.waitForSubWorkflow` mode containing `Wait` nodes or \"Human in the Loop\" `sendAndWait` nodes would make them return wrong data to the parent workflow once execution resumed after the sub workflow resumed from `waiting` state.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[\n  {\n    \"url\": \"https://x.com/tom_doerr/status/1887628241587827097\"\n  }\n]",
+        "[\n  {\n    \"response\": {\n      \"scraping_type\": \"x post (ex-twitter)\",\n      \"username\": \"Tom Dörr \",\n      \"description\": \"Build AI agents with MCP\"\n    }\n  }\n]",
+        "if (resource === 'message' && operation === SEND_AND_WAIT_OPERATION) {\n\tawait slackApiRequest.call(\n\t\tthis,\n\t\t'POST',\n\t\t'/chat.postMessage',\n\t\tcreateSendAndWaitMessageBody(this),\n\t);\n\n\tconst waitTill = configureWaitTillDate(this);\n\n\tawait this.putExecutionToWait(waitTill);\n\treturn [this.getInputData()];\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "n8n",
+      "community",
+      "workflow",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/13135",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/pull/13869"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 42,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with n8n installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
